display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NO (long-horizon strategic /
capital budgeting, want stability)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is this a US-GAAP/IFRS fair-value,
litigation, or tax engagement needing a
citable, court/audit-friendly standard?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KROLL RECOMMENDED ERP
+ Kroll's matched risk-free
(normalized 3.5% or spot 20Y, whichever higher).
Most-cited, defensible. ~5.0% as of 2025-09-02

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the goal a market-consistent,
point-in-time intrinsic valuation
(investing / corporate intrinsic DCF)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DAMODARAN IMPLIED ERP
+ current SPOT risk-free.
Forward-looking, internally consistent
with today's prices. ~4.23% at 2026 start

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HISTORICAL / SUPPLY-SIDE MEAN
(Kroll CRSP/SBBI).
Smooth and defensible, but stale
near regime shifts
